immutable_record_notice: Once published, this finding record is immutable. Corrections, reinterpretations, retractions, or new dispositions require a new record version linked to the superseded raw-byte digest.

claim.statement: Independent adjudicators would reproduce the constructed boundary dispositions under blinded use of the frozen rules.
claim.scope: Only the exact frozen boundary cases and profile; no broader population or natural category claim.

result_assessment_orthogonality_notice: Result classification and claim assessment are independent fields. A POSITIVE, NEGATIVE, NULL, or MIXED result does not determine whether the scoped claim is supported.
finding_statement: SYNTHETIC-DRY-RUN NON-EVIDENTIARY: independent adjudication was intentionally not run, so no agreement observation or claim assessment exists.
uncertainty: Agreement, disagreement patterns, semantic reproducibility, and evaluator sensitivity are entirely unobserved.
failures: No independent adjudicator, blinded evaluation protocol, or approved evaluator provenance was supplied; the preregistered decision rule therefore requires NOT_RUN.
limitations: NOT_RUN supplies no evidence for or against adjudicator agreement.
The separately retained disposition narrative is documentation, not a raw result artifact.
No independent validation or human evaluation occurred.

mechanism_maturity_effect.rationale: This terminal disposition belongs to a mechanism-free synthetic taxonomy dry run.

recommended_next_step: Preregister an independently governed adjudication study before obtaining evaluator classifications.
